## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR does. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new user-visible behaviour (minor bump)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch bump)
- [ ] `perf` / `refactor` — internal change (patch bump)
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `test` / `ci` / `build` / `style` — no release
- [ ] Breaking change (`!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` — major bump)

## Checklist

- [ ] **PR title** follows Conventional Commits (e.g. `feat(cart): persist cart to DB`)
- [ ] `mvn test` passes locally
- [ ] Updated docs / README if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] Any breaking change is marked with `!` in the title **and** explained in the PR body under `BREAKING CHANGE:`

<!-- Steps a reviewer can run to verify the change. -->
